metadata.name: LinkedIn Schema
metadata.description: Semantic extraction schema for LinkedIn — search, profile, company, jobs, and post pages

primary.value: figure ~ div > div:first-of-type > div:first-of-type p > span[aria-hidden='true']
figure ~ div > div:first-of-type > div:first-of-type p:first-of-type + div p
